A-KEYLESS-CONSENSUS.notes: KeylessConsensus makes a universal decrypt scope and secret key/share bytes unrepresentable in consensus state: client-held custody has no consensus authorization path; threshold custody is workload-scoped, member-bounded, exact-key-epoch, expiring, and counts distinct authenticated holders only. Exhaustive adaptive-corruption subsets reject below threshold; duplicate/foreign/old shares reject; rotation succeeds while a real NodeCore continues ordinary transfers, block production, and checkpoint finality with every optional lane disabled. The policy authorizes an opaque event only and never performs or stores decryption.

E-BASE-01.notes: Executable local precursor: parameterized differential gate accepts 1..10^7 generated cases and compares separate Rust/Go processes with a local arbitrary-precision Python oracle and AA/AB/BA/BB matrix. Dedicated real NodeCore falsifiers cover durable restart with exact state/finality recovery, finalized snapshot reconstruction, deterministic below-finality reorg, and production-wire unknown-mandatory-field rejection. PARTIAL: the full 10^7 run is not claimed by a smaller invocation, management/authorship/review are not independent in this worktree, and no local process can self-certify those external properties.

E-BLACKOUT-01.notes: Real NodeCore precursor starts with controls_bits=0 (all optional lanes disabled), settles ordinary Lumen transfers before and after epoch boundaries, produces Ground-paced blocks, rotates the narrow key policy without interruption, and finalizes every block old enough for the one-epoch FFG lag. PARTIAL: this invocation does not claim 30 simulated days, seven public-testnet days, a separately operated maximum-load NEL service fleet killed mid-window, or repeated post-release external runs.

E-WAN-01.notes: Deterministic P2P fault scheduler covers the exact latency endpoints/cross-sweep 50,200,400,800 ms and loss 0,2,5,10%, reordering, bandwidth asymmetry, validator crash, DA withholding, regional eclipse, an in-bound minority partition, and minority-only AI reachability metadata for 10 validators/fault bound 3. Real production header envelopes and DA shards are fed to four NodeCore views; unavailable blocks park without finality, targeted repair heals eclipse/partition, ordinary state and finalized checkpoints converge, and conflicting finality is exactly zero within two epochs. NodeCore now binds future-drift validation to genesis and exercises {12000,18000,30000}, selecting 12000 as the smallest passing value. PARTIAL: no four external regions/independent carriers, real six-hour partition, external operators, or public elapsed duration were available.

notes: Base-network claim cluster: real local keyless policy and deterministic NodeCore/P2P behavior/falsifier precursors. External independence, operators, carriers, regions, and duration are explicitly not claimed.
